text:
Created attachment 208637
Patch for devel/ros-catkin_pakg

Update devel/ros-catkin_pkg to 0.4.14,

No release notes are available, but you can see commits here:

https://github.com/ros-infrastructure/catkin_pkg/commits/0.4.14

The main changes are cleaning up the ROS distro trees.
